signals.headline: Kremlin Welcomes US-Israel-Iran Ceasefire Deal Amid Strait of Hormuz Tensions | YES | HIGH confidence** [1][6]
signals.raw:
Kremlin Welcomes US-Israel-Iran Ceasefire Deal Amid Strait of Hormuz Tensions | YES | HIGH confidence** [1][6]

A two-week ceasefire agreement between the United States, Israel, and Iran was announced on Wednesday (April 8, 2026), halting escalation risks from U.S. threats to strike Iranian infrastructure and addressing the worst oil supply shock in history due to Strait of Hormuz disruptions.[1]
matched_markets: Will the US x Iran ceasefire be extended by April 21, 2026?
Will Russia enter Ternuvate again by April 30?
US x Iran permanent peace deal by April 30, 2026?

signals.headline: South Korea's Annual Inflation Rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's Annual Inflation Rose to 2.2% in March 2026, Exceeding Central Bank Target | YES | HIGH confidence**

South Korea's annual inflation rate rose to 2.2% in March 2026, up from 2.0% in the previous two months but below market forecasts of 2.4%[2]. This marks a significant development because it represents the first increase in three months and reinforces inflationary pressures that the
